posts.author: Faintlight
posts.title: Does anyone know more about this? Is it true? Insane Canada criminalizing the bible?

twitter.content:
Say what? 👀

Canada just criminalized the Bible.  
Bill C-9 passed by Canada’s lawmakers.  

Now quoting Scripture on marriage, sin, or God’s design for sexuality can be prosecuted as “wilful promotion of hatred.”  

They ripped out the decades-old religious exemption from hate
